title: carex maritima subsp. cryptocarpa
intro: Carex maritima subsp. cryptocarpa, also known as the cryptic sedge, is a subspecies of plant in the genus Carex, characterized by its unique leaf structure and growth habit. The medicinal properties of Carex maritima subsp. cryptocarpa lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carex maritima subsp. cryptocarpa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
